positive: Symmetrical central composition of a stylized celestial fox merging with a geometric constellation pattern. The fox should have sharp, clean silhouettes and ethereal, gradient fur details that transition into deep indigo and cosmic gold speckles. Background elements include stylized crescent moons, orbiting planets rendered in clean vector geometry, and nebula smoke plumes in muted teal and lavender. The overall artwork must have extremely high contrast, suitable for direct-to-garment printing, with a bold, graphic, yet mystical aesthetic. Art Deco engraving style mixed with modern psychedelic graphic design. Flat, crisp lines, central focus, maximal detail, print-friendly.
